meaning: Kenya African National Union肯尼亚非洲民族联盟
examples: In 2005, No. 9 Typhoon "Maisha" and No. 15 Typhoon "Kanu" affected Shanghai one by one.
Kanu WILL play in the Carling Cup semi-final first leg against Middlesbrough at Highbury on Tuesday night.
Kanu trained yesterday and would like to face his former club Arsenal but his knee was described by Redknapp as "a bit sore".
David Cotterill grabbed the first before Bale set up Hal Robson-Kanu for the second.
Kanu added a fourth from close range late on to cap a dominant display.
